Home / Lore / Factions / Hyenas

faction

Hyenas

A hostile Washington faction recognizable by gas masks and, in later seasonal material, an expanding Spice operation tied to the Dark Zones.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Washington presence

The Hyenas are part of the original hostile faction landscape in Washington and remain active in later seasons. [1][3]

Spice operations

Later official material connects the group to Potent Spice production and chemical-material movement through a Toxic Dark Zone. [2]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    Ubisoft identifies the gasmask-wearing Hyenas as one of the hostile factions operating in Washington during The Division 2 campaign. [1]

  2. confirmed

    The Into the Dark season places the Hyenas behind Potent Spice experiments and material movement through the Toxic Dark Zone. [2]

  3. confirmed

    The Pact treats the Hyenas as an active faction with its own Retaliation rewards and faction-specific materials. [3]

Related records

  • Strategic Homeland Divisionopposed to
  • Washington, D.C.located at

Sources

  1. [1] Endgame Specializations, Black Tusks, and The Fight to Reclaim DC — Ubisoft (2019-02-04). Accessed 2026-07-19.
  2. [2] The Division 2: Into The Dark — Ubisoft (2026-06-15). Accessed 2026-07-19.
  3. [3] The Division 2: The Pact — Ubisoft (2025-09-08). Accessed 2026-07-19.
